# STRAT.053 ? Kaizen (Continuous Improvement)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** performance_excellence
**Domain:** PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Small incremental changes; everyone involved; standardize then improve; eliminate waste; respect for people; continuous cycle

## Application
Small improvements daily; involve all levels; standardize best practices; identify and remove waste; respect people; never-ending improvement

## Key Values
- Incremental change
- Universal participation
- Waste elimination
- Respect
- Continuous cycle

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, performance_excellence

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
